name:
Unit tests for the per-command iOS --allowed-domains rejection. It must
   fire on EVERY command — including against an already-running iOS backend
   — and must never merge the rejected flag into launch-flags. > Playwright provider is unaffected > allowed-domains with the default provider is not rejected here
